scan.Sequence:
<sequence>

<variables>
% general setup
sample_rate = float(250000000,1e7,1.2e9)

% parameters for CPMG
N         = float(8,0,1e4)
tau      = float(2e-6,0,1)
mod_depth   = float(1,0,1);
length_pi   = float(52e-9, 2e-9, 0.5)
phase_y    = float(90,-360,360)
phase_ym   = float(270,-360,360)

switch_delay = float(1.000000000000000e-07,0,100e-9);
wait_time   = float(2e-6, 0,1)
%delay_wrt_1mus = float(68e-9,0,500e-9) %calibrated by PL curve 11-08-05 13-17-48
delay_wrt_1mus  = float(0.2e-6,-0.1,0.1) % DLnsec LASER 1DExp-seq-Rabimodulated-vary-delay_wrt_1mus-2023-10-09-183857  

%adiabatic inversion
do_adiabatic_inversion = boolean(0)
sweep_range = float(100e6, 80e6, 500e6)
sweep_time  = float(1e-6, 100e-9, 10e-6)

mw_freq     = float(3.874400000000000e+09, 1e6, 15e9)
mw_ampl = float(-5, -20, 15)
ampIQ = float(5,-30,17) %in dBm
freqIQ      = float(50e6, 0,500*1e6)
detuning    = float(0,-10e6,10e6)
</variables>

<shaped_pulses>
</shaped_pulses>

<instructions>
mw_freq = mw_freq + detuning;
length_pi_over_2 = length_pi/2;
length_pi = round(length_pi*sample_rate)/sample_rate;
length_pi_over_2 = round(length_pi_over_2*sample_rate)/sample_rate;
%t_step=round((t_step-length_pi)*sample_rate)/sample_rate;
%tau=round((tau-length_pi_over_2)*sample_rate)/sample_rate;
tau=round((tau)*sample_rate)/sample_rate;
    
ch_on = [1 1 1 0 0];

PSeq = set_sample_rate(PSeq,sample_rate);
PSeq = enable_channels(PSeq, 1:5,ch_on); 
PSeq = set_microwave(PSeq, mw_freq, mw_ampl,ampIQ,freqIQ);

PSeq = polarize(PSeq,sample_rate,ch_on);

% Acquiring true 0 level reference 
PSeq = detection(PSeq,sample_rate,delay_wrt_1mus,ch_on); 
PSeq = wait_for_awg(PSeq,sample_rate,wait_time,ch_on);

% Acquire 1 level reference 
%if do_adiabatic_inversion
%   PSeq = adiabatic_inversion(PSeq,sample_rate,sweep_range,sweep_time,freqIQ,ch_on,mod_depth);
%   PSeq = detection(PSeq,sample_rate,delay_wrt_1mus,ch_on);
%   PSeq = wait_for_awg(PSeq,sample_rate,wait_time,ch_on);
%end



PSeq = rabi_pulse_mod_wait_time(PSeq,sample_rate,length_pi,mod_depth,switch_delay,ch_on);
PSeq = detection(PSeq,sample_rate,delay_wrt_1mus, ch_on);
PSeq = wait_for_awg(PSeq,sample_rate,wait_time,ch_on);

        

PSeq=rabi_pulse_mod_wait_time(PSeq,sample_rate,length_pi_over_2,mod_depth,switch_delay,ch_on,phase_ym);

for hlp=1:N
    PSeq=wait_for_awg(PSeq,sample_rate,tau,ch_on);
    PSeq=rabi_pulse_mod_wait_time(PSeq,sample_rate,length_pi,mod_depth,switch_delay,ch_on);
    PSeq=wait_for_awg(PSeq,sample_rate,tau,ch_on);
end

PSeq=rabi_pulse_mod_wait_time(PSeq,sample_rate,length_pi_over_2,mod_depth,switch_delay,ch_on,phase_y);


% Acquire Echo and long-illumination 0 level reference
PSeq = detection(PSeq,sample_rate,delay_wrt_1mus,ch_on);

</instructions>

</sequence>

ScanOrderInfo.order_semantics: order_each_avg{slice}{average} contains tau indices in acquisition order
order_each_avg{slice}{average} contains tau indices in acquisition order
